recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: 12 Mighty Orphans
recommendations.overview: Haunted by his mysterious past, a devoted high school football coach leads a scrawny team of orphans to the state championship during the Great Depression and inspires a broken nation along the way.

recommendations.title: Incantation
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of a family who believed they were possessed by spirits. This film follows a woman who must protect her child from a curse.

recommendations.title: Paper Moon
recommendations.overview: During the Great Depression, a con man finds himself saddled with a young girl who may or may not be his daughter, and the two forge an unlikely partnership.

recommendations.title: Seabiscuit
recommendations.overview: True story of the undersized Depression-era racehorse whose victories lifted not only the spirits of the team behind it but also those of their nation.

recommendations.title: The Imaginarium of Doctor Parnassus
recommendations.overview: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man agrees to help its immortal leader collect five souls and win a bet with the devil.

recommendations.title: My Neighbor Totoro
recommendations.overview: Two sisters move to the country with their father in order to be closer to their hospitalized mother, and discover the surrounding trees are inhabited by Totoros, magical spirits of the forest. When the youngest runs away from home, the older sister

recommendations.title: The Water Diviner
recommendations.overview: In 1919, Australian farmer Joshua Connor travels to Turkey to discover the fate of his three sons, reported missing in action. Holding on to hope, Joshua must travel across the war-torn landscape to find the truth and his own peace.

recommendations.title: Gun Crazy
recommendations.overview: Bart Tare is an ex-Army man who has a lifelong fixation with guns, he meets a kindred spirit in sharpshooter Annie Starr and goes to work at a carnival. After upsetting the carnival owner who lusts after Starr, they both get fired. Soon, on Starr's b

recommendations.title: The Purple Rose of Cairo
recommendations.overview: Cecilia is a waitress in New Jersey, living a dreary life during the Great Depression. Her only escape from her mundane reality is the movie theatre. After losing her job, Cecilia goes to see 'The Purple Rose of Cairo' in hopes of raising her spirits
